title: Les Pardaillan — Tome 01
summaries: "Les Pardaillan — Tome 01" by Michel Zévaco is a novel serialized between 1902 and 1918. This epic adventure begins in 1553 during the reign of Henri II and spans France's turbulent religious wars. The noble hero Pardaillan and his father clash with powerful rivals in a world of court intrigue and family vendettas. Their story sets in motion a sweeping saga where personal passions shape history, introducing unforgettable characters whose conflicts will echo across generations and transform the fate of Europe.
